memberdef.type: std::function< CellCustomParams(int row, int column, const std::string &cellValueText)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::Pdf::TableCustomRule = std::function<CellCustomParams( int row, int column, const std::string& cellValueText)>
memberdef.name: TableCustomRule

briefdescription.para: table parts
Ctor. Create a document, but not a page. To create a new page use newPage() method.
Dtor.

detaileddescription.para: Add text block in current cursor position. Move cursor. Box horizontal size is page width without offset. Box vertical size is automatically for text. horAlignment = left if isTitle - horAlignment = center, use titleFontSize

briefdescription.para: return text width

detaileddescription.para: Add set of pair string - value in current cursor position. Move cursor. Box horizontal size is page width without offset. Box vertical size is automatically for text.

briefdescription.para: Add image from file in current cursor position. If image bigger than page size, autoscale image to page size. Move cursor.
Add new pageand move cursor on it.
set function to customize new page after creation
Save document to file.
Checking the ability to work with a document.
set up new table (clear table customization, reset parameters to default values)
set table column widths
add in pdf table row with titles
set format for conversion values to string for each column
add in pdf table row with values

detaileddescription.para: parameters to customization table cell return text width (for table font parameters)

briefdescription.para: add rule to customize table cells
basic drawing methods without automatic cursor position control

detaileddescription.para: draw text in specific rect on page text will be cropped by rect

briefdescription.para: draw rect (filled with border)
close pdf document without saving. After this impossible add anything in document.
calculate the width of the lines, taking into account automatic hyphenation
base method to add hpdf image in current cursor position.
